caption: The video captures a live event celebrating the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) Foundation Day, as indicated by the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" displayed prominently at the top. The scene is split into two frames: on the left, a speaker, dressed in traditional attire with an orange and green scarf, addresses the audience from behind a podium adorned with the BJP logo. On the right, a group of attendees, wearing matching orange hats and scarves, listen attentively. The atmosphere appears formal yet celebratory, with the audience seated in rows, some clapping and others focused on the speaker. The event is being broadcasted live, as suggested by the "लाइव देखें" (Watch Live) text and social media handles at the bottom of the screen. The overall setting conveys a sense of unity and political engagement among the participants.
